February 20, 2024 
A Day in the Life at NCHHSTP 
At a glance 
A Day in the Life was created to help jobseekers and employees understand various career paths and roles. Learn more about the various general schedule (GS) job series and how to excel from the experts themselves.
Overview 
NCHHSTP is deeply committed to developing the careers and furthering the professional development of its employees. As such, the Center provides potential and current employees with information on career and workforce development resources and initiatives. 
A Day in the Life event was created by the NCHHSTP Workforce Champions Working Group. This recurring event helps jobseeker
